details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.house_mesh_juniper_ssd
alias: house_mesh_juniper_ssd
purchased_on: 2026-02-14
total_eur: 105
counterparty: Datenspeicher Köhler GmbH
project: House Mesh
related_entity: Juniper
lines:
  - item: 2 TB SATA SSD
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 89
    line_eur: 89
  - item: USB clone adapter
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 16
    line_eur: 16
---
# Juniper storage refresh

```text
+----------------+-----------------------------+
| field          | value                       |
+----------------+-----------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                        |
| bill_id        | bill.house_mesh_juniper_ssd |
| alias          | house_mesh_juniper_ssd      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-02-14                  |
| total_eur      | 105                         |
| counterparty   | Datenspeicher Köhler GmbH   |
| project        | House Mesh                  |
| related_entity | Juniper                     |
+----------------+-----------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item              | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | 2 TB SATA SSD     | 1   | 89       | 89       |
| 2 | USB clone adapter | 1   | 16       | 16       |
+---+-------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL             |     |          | 105      |
+---+-------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Part boring maintenance, part trust-building because Juniper backups were becoming real household infrastructure.

function.message: OCRed the Juniper-related bill by adding YAML frontmatter to `50_finance/purchases/2026_02_14__eur_000105__bill__house_mesh_juniper_ssd.md` and removed the processed inbox request.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap rules (tree, AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read OCR and migration workflows plus finance schema, preserved the original bill body verbatim under the new frontmatter, and deleted the inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request asked to OCR all bills related to Juniper. The canonical entity file `10_entities/cast/juniper.md` identifies the system alias as `juniper`. A finance search for that canonical alias found one matching bill, `50_finance/purchases/2026_02_14__eur_000105__bill__house_mesh_juniper_ssd.md`, whose visible text contained all required bill-schema fields and line items specified in `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md`. I added the corresponding YAML frontmatter in place and then deleted the processed inbox request as directed by the inbox workflow.
